text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond gets injured during training, so I
rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Owww!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I only moved it a little... It might be more serious
than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But... if all I do is rest, my dreams will only slip
further away.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Resting very well may be the best option... but I
want to move past this and grow even more!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can overcome the pain... Will you please
let me keep training?
choice_data_list: I can't let you push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can overcome the pain... Will you please
let me keep training?
choice_data_list: I can't let you push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But... while I sit around resting, everyone else is
out there improving.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I understand. We can't rush these things, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I still feel disappointed, but I'll try to use that
disappointment as motivation once I can train
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving medical attention, Satono
Diamond returns to her dorm looking
disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Then, let's head back to the track.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I'll be okay. I can handle this...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I took my injury too lightly.
I apologize...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After putting too much stress on it, her injury
ends up taking quite a while to heal.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I think I can push through this level of pain!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Just one step at a time. Don't strain yourself too
much!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hehe, I did it! I didn't give in to the pain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Keeping close attention on her injuries, Satono
Diamond is able to finish her training with
astounding self-discipline.
